posts.caption:
May 1940. Pocket at the sea.
Armor could finish it — or halt.
📗 Documented: they halt. Ships come.
#history #ww2 #dunkirk #fyp

posts.title: May 1940: German armor halts — and a fleet comes for Dunkirk
posts.caption:
The pocket is real. The sea is behind the Allies.

📗 Documented baseline: armored thrusts pause; Operation Dynamo lifts a living army to Britain.

Series: ANOR Fork / ELOSTIRION

#dunkirk #ww2 #history #1940

settings.title: May 1940: German armor halts — and a fleet comes for Dunkirk

posts.caption:

#althistory #historytok #dunkirk
